python3 - <<'PY' import os, html from pathlib import Path from datetime import datetime root = Path('/home/abbu-rpi5/.openclaw') out_txt = Path('/home/abbu-rpi5/.openclaw/workspace/openclaw-directory-map.txt') out_html = Path('/home/abbu-rpi5/.openclaw/workspace/openclaw-directory-map.html') def walk_tree(path: Path, prefix=''): try: entries = sorted(list(path.iterdir()), key=lambda p: (p.is_file(), p.name.lower())) except PermissionError: yield prefix + '└── [permission denied]' return for i, entry in enumerate(entries): is_last = i == len(entries) - 1 branch = '└── ' if is_last else '├── ' suffix = '/' if entry.is_dir() else '' yield prefix + branch + entry.name + suffix if entry.is_dir(): extension = ' ' if is_last else '│ ' yield from walk_tree(entry, prefix + extension) def count_items(path: Path): dirs = files = 0 for _, dirnames, filenames in os.walk(path): dirs += len(dirnames) files += len(filenames) return dirs, files dirs, files = count_items(root) lines = [] lines.append('OPENCLAW DIRECTORY MAP') lines.append('=' * 80) lines.append(f'Root: {root}') lines.append(f'Generated: {datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds")}') lines.append(f'Total directories: {dirs}') lines.append(f'Total files: {files}') lines.append('') lines.append('Legend: directories end with /') lines.append('') lines.append(root.name + '/') lines.extend(walk_tree(root)) out_txt.write_text('\n'.join(lines), encoding='utf-8') # Simple HTML version html_lines = [] for line in lines: html_lines.append(html.escape(line)) html_doc = f''' OpenClaw Directory Map

OpenClaw Directory Map

Generated from {html.escape(str(root))}
{'
'.join(html_lines)}
''' out_html.write_text(html_doc, encoding='utf-8') # top-level quick stats print(f'Wrote {out_txt}') print(f'Wrote {out_html}') for p in sorted(root.iterdir(), key=lambda p: (p.is_file(), p.name.lower())): if p.is_dir(): d,f = count_items(p) print(f'{p.name}/ -> {d} dirs, {f} files') else: print(f'{p.name} -> file') PY

arguments.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
root = Path('/home/abbu-rpi5/.openclaw')
out = Path('/home/abbu-rpi5/.openclaw/workspace/openclaw-directory-overview.txt')

def count_items(path: Path):
    dirs = files = 0
    for _, dirnames, filenames in os.walk(path):
        dirs += len(dirnames)
        files += len(filenames)
    return dirs, files

notes = {
    'agents': 'agent runtime state, auth/model profiles, and saved session logs',
    'browser': 'embedded browser profile and cache/storage used by browser automation',
    'canvas': 'canvas-related runtime data',
    'completions': 'completion/request artifacts',
    'credentials': 'stored credentials/config secrets area',
    'cron': 'scheduled automation definitions/state',
    'delivery-queue': 'queued outbound delivery work',
    'devices': 'paired device records',
    'identity': 'instance/account identity metadata',
    'logs': 'runtime logs',
    'media': 'inbound/outbound media files',
    'memory': 'memory store outside the workspace',
    'telegram': 'telegram channel/provider state',
    'workspace': 'your editable home: docs, skills, memory notes, persona files, etc.',
}
lines = []
lines.append('OPENCLAW DIRECTORY OVERVIEW')
lines.append('='*80)
lines.append(f'Root: {root}')
lines.append(f'Generated: {datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds")}')
lines.append('')
lines.append('High-level reading:')
lines.append('- browser/ is by far the noisiest subtree because it contains Chromium user-data and cache files.')
lines.append('- workspace/ is the human-facing area where assistant notes, docs, and project files live.')
lines.append('- agents/ holds session history and agent runtime data.')
lines.append('- media/ holds attached files like the voice notes you send.')
lines.append('- cron/, delivery-queue/, and telegram/ are the automation/messaging plumbing.')
lines.append('')
lines.append('Top-level map:')
lines.append('')
for p in sorted(root.iterdir(), key=lambda p: (p.is_file(), p.name.lower())):
    if p.is_dir():
        d, f = count_items(p)
        lines.append(f'- {p.name}/  ({d} dirs, {f} files)')
        note = notes.get(p.name)
        if note:
            lines.append(f'  {note}')
    else:
        lines.append(f'- {p.name}  (file)')
        if p.name.startswith('openclaw.json'):
            lines.append('  main config and its backups')
        elif p.name == 'exec-approvals.json':
            lines.append('  records command approval decisions')
        elif p.name == 'update-check.json':
            lines.append('  updater/version check metadata')
lines.append('')
lines.append('Files generated alongside this overview:')
lines.append('- openclaw-directory-map.txt  -> full recursive tree of every discovered folder/file')
lines.append('- openclaw-directory-map.html -> HTML version of the same tree')
out.write_text('\n'.join(lines), encoding='utf-8')
print(out)
